name: proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_path_use_cli
raw_query: any where (process.command_line like~ ("*~1\\*", "*~2\\*")) and (not ((process.parent.executable like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\Dism.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\cleanmgr.exe")) or (process.parent.executable like~ ("*\\winget.exe", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\WinGet\\*")) or (process.parent.executable:"C:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\v*" and process.parent.executable:"*\\csc.exe") or ((process.executable:"*\\AppData\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Temp\\*") or process.command_line:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*"))) and (not (process.parent.executable:"C:\\Program Files\\GPSoftware\\Directory Opus\\dopus.exe" or (process.parent.executable like~ ("*\\aurora-agent-64.exe", "*\\aurora-agent.exe")) or process.parent.executable:"*\\thor\\thor64.exe" or (process.command_line like~ ("*C:\\Program Files\\Git\\post-install.bat*", "*C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\scalar.exe*")) or (process.parent.executable:"*\\WebEx\\webexhost.exe" or process.command_line:"*\\appdata\\local\\webex\\webex64\\meetings\\wbxreport.exe*") or process.parent.executable:"*\\veeam.backup.shell.exe" or process.parent.executable:"*\\Everything\\Everything.exe"))
